case_title: WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK, A SOUTH DAKOTA vs. OUDERKIRK, DONNA S AKA DONNA OUDERKIRK et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK, A SOUTH DAKOTA STATE CHARTERED BANK, FKA DIAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT OUDERKIRK, DONNA S AKA DONNA OUDERKIRK DOES ONE TO TEN, BOTH INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-05-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-17-2001

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK, A SOUTH DAKOTA STATE CHARTERED BANK, FKA DIAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OUDERKIRK, DONNA S AKA DONNA OUDERKIRK $7,105.61 PRINCIPAL, $118.42 INTEREST, $238.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,462.03, STAY OF EXECUTION IS ORDERED ON CONDITIONS THAT THE DEFT. PAYS $200.00 ON THE 10TH DAY OF JUNE,2001 W/ THE BALANCE TO BE PAID MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $200.00 EACH, BEGINNING JULY 10, 2001 AND ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH SUCCEEDING MO. UNTIL PAID IN FULL. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL BANK, A SOUTH DAKOTA STATE CHARTERED BANK, FKA DIAL BANK OUDERKIRK, DONNA S AKA DONNA OUDERKIRK
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
